stories.headline: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage
stories.description: Thousands of Lloyds Banking Group customers reported problems with online banking access on Wednesday morning.

stories.headline: 'Absolute chaos' as A76 through Sanquhar closes completely
stories.description: Businesses in Sanquhar say the closure of the A76 through the heart of their town is a "shambles".

stories.headline: Israel’s invasion of southern Lebanon devastates centuries of history
stories.description: From Phoenician temples to Crusader castles, heritage sites bear the brunt of Israel’s expanding military offensive.
